MINI MINUTES FOR APR-05-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT ROMERO, RUBEN TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT VASQUEZ, RAUL THIS IS A ZERO JUDGMENT. RESPONDENT SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE PLAINTIFF ANY MONEY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OWE DEFENDANT ANY MONEY ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THIS IS A FINAL JUDGMENT AND CANNOT BE APPEALED. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:39am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez - clerk, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ruben Romero is present and represented by Rebecca Biernat and with interpreter Rigoberto Nolasco. Respondent Raul Vaszuez appears in pro per. Parties testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHA (1) Misc. document including receipts and lease agreement.

11:24 am

Matter is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Judgment Entered
